# Verii v1.1.2

## Changes

### [#587](https://github.com/LFDT-Verii/core/pull/587) Centralized registrar organization creation flow
- Consolidated registrar organization creation into a shared flow across direct creation, invitation, and add-service entry points.
- Added integration and unit coverage for the centralized organization creation behavior.
- Improved service setup and signup redirect handling around organization creation.

### [#594](https://github.com/LFDT-Verii/core/pull/594) Registrar logout redirect handling
- Made the registrar React Admin auth provider tolerate Auth0 clearing user data during logout.
- Moved normal logged-out login redirects into `PrivateAppRoot`, keeping signup redirect handling focused on invitation signup redirects.
- Clarified the no-organization cancel action as `Log out & discard` and added regression coverage for logout identity lookup.

### [#596](https://github.com/LFDT-Verii/core/pull/596) Registrar logout intent tracking
- Passed explicit logout source metadata through registrar logout entry points.
- Added a `resolvingLogout` auth state so intentional logout can be distinguished from refresh and generic auth resolution.
- Exported tracing utilities needed by registrar consumers.

## Backward incompatibilities

- None.
